'''Harsis''' was a short, slender, dark-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. A [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], he served as the sensor officer on the ''[[Direption]]'' under the command of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Vict Darron]] in the battle for [[Liinade III]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
